title: DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Chennai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions:
DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions!
